_definitions.description: Field definitions for Titan Gear extraction data from Top War (Server 2864)

fields.heroId: Unique hero ID in the game
fields.heroName: Display name of the hero (from rendered UI labels)
fields.slots: Object keyed by slot position (1-6). Each slot is one piece of Titan Gear.
fields.slots.*.name: Display name of the gear piece (e.g., Assault Pistol)
fields.slots.*.equipId: Gear template ID. Prefix = slot type (1001xx=Weapon, 1002xx=Armor, 1003xx=Accessory, 1004xx=Helmet, 1005xx=Device, 1006xx=Boots). Last 2 digits = quality (02=purple, 03=purple+, 04=gold)
fields.slots.*.scores: Combat power contribution per branch: land (Army), navy (Navy), air (Air Force)
fields.slots.*.infos: Raw buff data array from game memory
fields.slots.*.infos[].tid: templateId - buff type identifier. Multiple IDs can map to same display name (different tiers/rolls). For type 2 (runes), format is {slotPos}0{runeCode}
fields.slots.*.infos[].val: For type 1: percentage value x100 (e.g., 330 = 3.3%). For type 2: always 0
fields.slots.*.buffNames: Display names for all buffs in order: base stat(s) first, then random stats. Read from rendered UI labels
fields.slots.*.enhanceValues: Enhancement bonus values for base stats (e.g., +21.58%). Config IDs: 930100 = All units Attack, 930000 = All units HP
fields.slots.*.effectName: Special effect / rune name (e.g., Magnetic Field, Magnetize)
fields.slots.*.effectDesc: Special effect description text (concatenated from RichText fragments)
fields.slots.*.randomStats: Parsed random stats with max value comparison
fields.slots.*.randomStats[].value: Rolled value as displayed in game
fields.slots.*.randomStats[].max: Maximum possible value for this stat type
fields.slots.*.refinement: 70% refinement check for random stats on this gear piece
fields.slots.*.refinement.totalValue: Sum of all random stat values on this gear
fields.slots.*.refinement.totalMax: Sum of max possible values for each random stat (varies by stat type)
fields.heroRefinementSummary: Per-hero summary: how many gear slots meet the 70% refinement threshold
fields.exclusiveSkill: Hero exclusive skill: {skillId, level}. First skill in _extraSkill array. Unique per hero, levels 1-8.

baseStats.description: Base stats are fixed per gear piece and improved via enhancement. Always All units Attack and/or All units HP.
examples: All units Attack 15% + All units HP 5%

randomStatMaxValues.description: Each gear piece has up to 3 random stat rolls. Max values by category:

runeSystem.description: Special effects (runes) on gear slots. Odd slots (1,3,5) = active runes, even slots (2,4,6) = passive runes.
runeSystem.starGradeSystem: Each star has 3 sub-levels. StarLevel uses 0/0.5/1/1.5/2/2.5/3 notation. 1★ runes max at 1.0, 3★ runes max at 3.0. Gear without a rune has no starLevel field.

Artillery Storm.description: If the hero equipped with this gear has the Attack Enhancement effect, then this effect is boosted by {value}%.

All-Out Surge.description: In the first round of battle, after the hero equipped with this gear triggers the active skill, the hero will trigger it an additional time. The damage of the re-triggered skill will be {value}% of the initial trigger.

Tactical Awareness.description: After equipping this gear, all your units gain a {value}% Damage Increase attribute.

Searing.description: Adds 1 stack of {value}% Ignition effect to {targets} random targets.

Armor-Breaking.description: Adds 1 stack of {value}% Vulnerable effect to {targets} random targets.

Impact.description: Adds 1 stack of {value}% Debilitation effect to {targets} random targets.

Magnetic Field.description: Adds 1 stack of {value}% Magnetic Pulse effect to {targets} random targets.

Steel Torrent.description: If the hero equipped with this gear has the HP Boost effect, then this effect is boosted by {value}%.

Unbreakable.description: Indestructible effect extended by 1 round, additional round has {value}% of the original effect.

Stealth Hologram.description: After equipping this gear, all your units gain a {value}% Decreased Damage Taken attribute.

Flammable.description: If the hero has the Ignition effect, increased by {value}%.

Heavy Blow.description: If the hero has the Vulnerable effect, increased by {value}%.

Debilitate.description: If the hero has the Debilitation effect, increased by {value}%.

Magnetize.description: If the hero has the Magnetic Pulse effect, increased by {value}%.

slots3and5.note: Tactical Awareness upgrades to 3★ here (vs 1★ on Slot 1)

slots4and6.note: Stealth Hologram upgrades to 3★ here (vs 1★ on Slot 2)

refinementSystem.description: Certain buffs only activate when the combined random stat progress on a single gear piece reaches 70% of the total possible value. The threshold varies per gear because random stat types can be mixed.

2.name: Tactical Backarmor
